narrative: US-Iran peace negotiations drive a sharp dollar sell-off as Middle East risk premiums unwind — DXY -0.43% to a 2.5-month low while gold surges +2.80% near $4,700. USD/JPY retreats to 156.40 on the shift in geopolitical sentiment; NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (+1.18% spread) reflects NZD outperformance (+0.57% avg) vs CAD weakness (-0.60% avg) as crude oil plunges. Equities +1.11%; VIX 17.1. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27.
